creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 154923
"svn diff" for the upgrade. no added/deleted files.

shotwell 0.22.0 is out, here's the update to the port.
At the same time, I'm (hopefully) fixing the linker problems and crashes observed on old systems (see #196707 and #196236) and petting portscout.
I'm attaging "make stage-qa" and "portline -AC" output, and tested the port on FreeBSD 10.1. My VirtualBox is acting up, so I cannot test on FreeBSD 9. Perhaps I'll come around to freeing some disk space for pudriere jails in the next days...
